name: James River Outfitters
description: At the Y-Bridge/Galena take-out; standard ~6-mi float ends at their property. Publishes a live badge off USGS 07052500 gage height (<7 ft clear, 7-8 ft caution, >8 ft closed).

name: Float the James / Horsecreek Ranch
description: Private Horse Creek river access near Galena; 2-mi and 6-mi floats, camping and cabins.
